title: VeloraOS 1.10.10 - Mobile UI Polish
releaseNotes: Adds a fixed mobile bottom navigation bar for Home, Chat, Models and Settings.
Simplifies the mobile header so desktop navigation and status controls no longer stack on phones.
Removes the visible Skip to main content button while retaining hidden accessibility status and focus behaviour.
Fixes Apple Home Screen icon discovery with dedicated opaque touch icons and root fallback routes.
Preserves HTTPS, trusted local CA, PWA support, accounts, chats, models, notifications, licensing and secure rollback updates.
